name: Cuttlefish with Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cuttlefish by removing the head, attached tentacles, and intestines; discard the intestines.
2. Pull out the cuttle bone if squid is being prepared. Remove any fine skin.
3. Slice the hood or body of the cuttlefish into strips. If using squid, slice the head and tentacles.
4. Place the prepared cuttlefish or squid in a pan and cook on medium heat for 15 minutes in its own juice.
5. Add half the oil, just enough water to cover, and season with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer gently for 45 minutes or until tender.
6. Meanwhile, trim and wash the spinach thoroughly, then drain well. Chop the leaves and stalks coarsely.
7. Heat remaining oil in a separate pan and gently fry the spring onions until soft. Add the chopped spinach and stir over heat until it wilts.
8. Mix the spinach mixture with the cuttlefish or squid and lemon juice. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
